Jim launched fulfillment section. It's going to be awesome. Buckle up. So what is fulfillment? It is the everything that happens between getting money, everything that happens after the sale that should lead to making another sale with that person fundamentally fail. And they believe that they are trying to make sales to other way around. They get customers to make sales rather than making sales to get customers. And so you need to make sales with the intention of getting a customer to do that. It means you have to provide exceptional value so that they have the desire to give you more money.
